heading: Reserves: separation for absence without authority or sentence to imprisonment
label: 12684 Reserves: separation for absence without authority or sentence to imprisonment
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 1163(b) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1662(i)(2)

Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.text: who has been absent without authority for at least three months;
who may be separated under by reason of a sentence to confinement adjudged by a court-martial; orsection 12687 of this title

who is sentenced to confinement in a Federal or State penitentiary or correctional institution after having been found guilty of an offense by a court other than a court-martial or other military court, and whose sentence has become final.
